_comment: Copy this to api_keys.json and fill in your keys. LLM keys: add 1 or 2 of each (extras are rotated to dodge free-tier rate limits). finnhub_api_key: free real-time stock quotes from https://finnhub.io (no identity check). Alpaca keys are OPTIONAL (only if you want real Alpaca paper trading instead of the built-in local mock account).
